narratives.name: MEV Infrastructure Maturation & Validator Optimization
narratives.description: Jito's MEV infrastructure continues to mature with active development on jito-solana validator client and increased validator adoption. This represents infrastructure-level optimization that precedes broader validator network upgrades and MEV standardization across Solana.

leading: jito-foundation/jito-solana: +13 commits (z-score: 3.21), +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — active validator client development
Jito Tip Router & Jito Stake Pool: 1000 tx each — consistent MEV infrastructure usage
coincident: Jito Tip Router: 1000 transactions (z-score: 0.52)
Jito Stake Pool: 1000 transactions (z-score: 0.52)
JTO token: +27.25% price delta (14d), $23.5M volume — market validation
confirming: JTO: +27.25% 14-day performance with $23.5M 24h volume — strong market confirmation

narratives.name: Solana Read Layer & Indexing Infrastructure Expansion
narratives.description: Multi-chain wallet infrastructure (Oisy, Unstoppable) and RPC/indexing SDKs (Helius) show accelerating development activity. This signals builders prioritizing efficient data access and cross-chain compatibility, foundational for scaling Solana's developer experience.

leading: dfinity/oisy-wallet: +25 commits (z-score: 6.17) — highest commit velocity, multi-chain wallet with Solana support
helius-labs/helius-sdk: +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — indexing/RPC infrastructure gaining traction
horizontalsystems/unstoppable-wallet-android: -74 commits (z-score: -18.18) — maintenance phase, but multi-chain Solana support established
coincident: Consistent onchain activity across DEX programs (Jupiter, Raydium, Orca) at 1000 tx each
TVL growth: +$363M (5.6% delta) — capital flowing to indexed/accessible protocols
confirming: Stablecoin net inflow: +$331M — capital positioning for indexed trading infrastructure

narratives.name: Anchor Framework & Developer Tooling Standardization
narratives.description: Anchor, Solana Program Library, and developer education repos (program-examples) maintain steady star growth and community adoption. This represents mature, stable infrastructure that continues to standardize Solana smart contract development patterns.

leading: solana-foundation/anchor: +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — steady adoption
solana-labs/solana-program-library: +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — core library maintenance
solana-developers/program-examples: +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — education/onboarding infrastructure stable
coincident: Anchor-based protocols active: Orca Whirlpool (1000 tx), Drift Protocol (1000 tx), marginfi (1000 tx)
confirming: Anchor ecosystem tokens stable: ORCA +53.6%, DRIFT ecosystem active

narratives.name: Raydium AMM Dominance & DEX Volume Concentration
narratives.description: Raydium maintains #2 DEX volume position ($412M 24h) with active SDK development (raydium-sdk-V2, raydium-clmm). PumpSwap's explosive growth (+229% volume delta) signals retail-driven trading concentration on Solana, with Raydium as infrastructure backbone.

leading: raydium-io/raydium-sdk-V2: +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — SDK development active
MeteoraAg/dlmm-sdk: +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — DLMM liquidity infrastructure expanding
coincident: Raydium AMM: $412M 24h volume (z-score: 2.89), -44.9% delta but still #2
PumpSwap: $633M 24h volume (z-score: 4.68), +229% delta — explosive retail volume
Raydium CLMM: 1000 transactions — concentrated liquidity adoption
Meteora DLMM: $108M 24h volume — alternative liquidity model gaining traction
confirming: Meme token category: $4.3B market cap (+0.85% delta) — retail participation driving DEX volume

narratives.name: Solana Meme Token Market Expansion & Retail Participation
narratives.description: Meme token category reached $4.3B market cap with explosive performers (PIPPIN +167%, BAN +89%, HNT +78%). PumpSwap's record volume ($633M, +229% delta) indicates retail-driven trading infrastructure maturation and sustained speculative participation on Solana.

leading: Meme token infrastructure: PumpSwap, Raydium, BisonFi all showing high volume
coincident: PumpSwap: $633M 24h volume (z-score: 4.68), +229% volume delta — record retail activity
Solana Meme category: $4.3B market cap (+0.85% delta)
Top performers: PIPPIN +167%, 9BIT +98%, BAN +89%, HNT +78% — sustained retail demand
confirming: Trending tokens: PUNCH, PENGU gaining social momentum
social: Solana trending: PUNCH, PENGU, SOL, ZAMA — meme tokens dominating social discovery

narratives.name: Validator & Core Infrastructure Consolidation
narratives.description: Firedancer (Jump Crypto's validator client) and Agave (Anza's Solana fork) show accelerating star growth (+3 and +1 respectively), signaling competition in validator infrastructure. This precedes potential network-level performance improvements and validator client diversification.

leading: firedancer-io/firedancer: +3 stars (z-score: 8.46) — highest star velocity, alternative validator client gaining attention
anza-xyz/agave: +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — Anza's Solana fork maintaining presence
solana-labs/solana: -1 star (z-score: -3.10) — core client showing slight decline, suggesting shift to alternatives
coincident: Validator infrastructure: Jito Stake Pool (1000 tx), consistent validator participation

narratives.name: AI Agent & LLM Integration for Solana Development
narratives.description: New cluster of AI-integrated Solana repos (qntx/x402-openai-typescript, x402-openai-python) signals emerging developer tooling that combines LLMs with Solana development. This represents early-stage infrastructure for AI-assisted smart contract development and onchain automation.

leading: qntx/x402-openai-typescript: New repo cluster with Solana + OpenAI + web3 topics
qntx/x402-openai-python: New repo cluster with Solana + OpenAI + web3 topics
sendaifun/solana-agent-kit: +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — AI agent framework for Solana gaining traction
coincident: Solana-agent-kit: LangChain integration enabling AI-driven onchain interactions

narratives.name: Stablecoin Inflow & Capital Positioning for Volatility
narratives.description: Stablecoin net inflow of +$331M (inflows $577M vs outflows $246M) indicates capital positioning ahead of volatility. Combined with TVL growth (+$363M) and Solana meme token expansion, this signals retail capital accumulation for speculative trading infrastructure.

coincident: Stablecoin net inflow: +$331M (inflows $577M, outflows $246M)
TVL growth: +$363M (+5.6% delta) to $6.48B
DEX volume concentration: PumpSwap +229%, Raydium stable at $412M
confirming: Meme token category: $4.3B market cap — capital flowing to speculative assets

narratives.name: Wallet & Payment Infrastructure Standardization
narratives.description: Multi-chain wallet development (Oisy, Unstoppable) and wallet adapter standardization (anza-xyz/wallet-adapter) show mature adoption patterns. This infrastructure enables seamless Solana payment integration across ecosystems, supporting mainstream adoption.

leading: dfinity/oisy-wallet: +25 commits (z-score: 6.17) — multi-chain wallet with Solana support
anza-xyz/wallet-adapter: +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — standardized wallet integration framework
horizontalsystems/unstoppable-wallet-android: Multi-chain Solana support established
coincident: Consistent onchain wallet activity across protocols
confirming: Stablecoin inflow: +$331M — capital flowing through wallet infrastructure

narratives.name: Solana Ecosystem Lending & Margin Infrastructure Maturation
narratives.description: Lending protocols (Marginfi, Solend, Kamino) and margin trading (Drift Protocol) maintain consistent onchain activity (1000 tx each) with active SDK development. This represents mature, stable infrastructure supporting leveraged trading and capital efficiency across Solana DeFi.

leading: mrgnlabs/marginfi-v2: +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — lending protocol development active
drift-labs/protocol-v2: +2 stars (z-score: 5.57) — margin trading infrastructure gaining adoption
Kamino-Finance/klend: +1 star (z-score: 2.68) — lending protocol development stable
coincident: Marginfi: 1000 transactions (z-score: 0.52)
Drift Protocol: 1000 transactions (z-score: 0.52)
Solend: 1000 transactions (z-score: 0.52)
confirming: TVL growth: +$363M — capital flowing to lending infrastructure

narratives.name: Cross-Chain Interoperability & Multi-Asset Trading Infrastructure
narratives.description: Audius (music streaming on Solana/Ethereum) shows active development (+9 commits), while LayerZero v2 and multi-chain wallets signal growing cross-chain infrastructure. This enables Solana to serve as a hub for multi-asset and cross-chain trading.

leading: AudiusProject/apps: +9 commits (z-score: 2.23) — cross-chain music protocol active
dfinity/oisy-wallet: +25 commits — multi-chain wallet with Solana integration
LayerZero-Labs/LayerZero-v2: Cross-chain infrastructure development
coincident: Multi-chain DEX activity: Raydium, Orca, Jupiter all supporting cross-chain liquidity
confirming: Stablecoin inflow: +$331M — capital positioning for cross-chain trading
social: Solana trending: SOL maintaining presence alongside cross-chain tokens (ZAMA)

buildIdeas.title: MEV Transparency Dashboard for Validators
buildIdeas.description: A real-time dashboard that visualizes MEV extraction patterns, validator profitability, and jito-solana adoption metrics across the network. Validators can benchmark their performance against peers and identify optimization opportunities, creating transparency in an increasingly competitive validator landscape.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Jito's validator client adoption is accelerating, but validators lack standardized tools to understand their MEV economics. This fills a critical gap as validator competition intensifies and MEV becomes a material revenue stream.

buildIdeas.title: Unified Cross-Chain RPC Aggregator with Solana Priority
buildIdeas.description: An SDK that abstracts RPC calls across Solana, Ethereum, and other chains with automatic failover, request batching, and Helius-powered indexing for Solana-specific data. Developers get a single interface for multi-chain queries without managing multiple RPC endpoints.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Multi-chain wallet infrastructure (Oisy, Unstoppable) is maturing, but developers still lack a unified data layer. Helius's indexing maturity + wallet standardization creates demand for seamless cross-chain queries.

buildIdeas.title: Anchor IDL Auto-Documentation & Type Generator
buildIdeas.description: A CLI tool that generates interactive API documentation, TypeScript types, and client SDKs directly from Anchor IDL files. Automatically publishes to a searchable registry, reducing friction for developers integrating with Anchor programs.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Anchor adoption is mainstream and stable, but IDL documentation remains fragmented. Standardizing this workflow reduces onboarding friction as Solana developer ecosystem scales.

buildIdeas.title: Raydium CLMM Liquidity Optimizer Bot
buildIdeas.description: An automated bot that manages concentrated liquidity positions on Raydium CLMM, rebalancing based on volatility, fee tier optimization, and gas costs. LPs can set risk parameters and let the bot maximize returns without manual intervention.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Raydium CLMM is mature with $412M+ 24h volume, but LP management remains manual and inefficient. Concentrated liquidity adoption is accelerating, creating demand for automation tools.

buildIdeas.title: PumpSwap Sentiment & Whale Tracking API
buildIdeas.description: A real-time API that tracks large transactions, holder distribution, and social sentiment for meme tokens on PumpSwap. Retail traders get early signals on whale movements and community momentum, reducing information asymmetry.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Meme token market reached $4.3B with PumpSwap hitting $633M volume (+229% delta). Retail participation is explosive but information-poor; this tool democratizes whale tracking that institutional traders already use.

buildIdeas.title: Meme Token Launchpad with Bonding Curve Analytics
buildIdeas.description: A launchpad platform that simplifies meme token creation with built-in bonding curve analytics, community tools, and fair-launch mechanics. Creators get transparent metrics on token distribution and early investor behavior.
buildIdeas.whyNow: PumpSwap's success (+229% volume delta) proves retail demand for meme tokens, but current tools lack transparency. Bonding curve analytics + fair-launch mechanics address creator needs as market matures.

buildIdeas.title: Firedancer Performance Monitoring Suite
buildIdeas.description: A monitoring and alerting system specifically for Firedancer validators, tracking slot leadership, MEV capture, and client-specific performance metrics. Validators can compare Firedancer vs. Agave vs. Solana Labs clients in real-time.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Firedancer and Agave are accelerating in adoption (+3 and +1 stars), signaling validator client diversification. Validators need tools to evaluate which client maximizes their returns as competition intensifies.

buildIdeas.title: AI-Powered Solana Smart Contract Auditor
buildIdeas.description: An LLM-powered CLI tool that analyzes Anchor programs for common vulnerabilities, gas inefficiencies, and security anti-patterns. Developers get instant feedback on contract quality before deployment, reducing audit costs.
buildIdeas.whyNow: AI-integrated Solana repos are emerging (x402-openai, solana-agent-kit), and Anchor adoption is mainstream. LLMs are now capable enough to provide meaningful security analysis, creating demand for automated auditing.

buildIdeas.title: Stablecoin Inflow Predictor & Capital Flow Dashboard
buildIdeas.description: A dashboard that correlates stablecoin inflows (+$331M) with trading volume spikes, meme token launches, and volatility events. Traders and protocols get early signals on capital positioning and market sentiment shifts.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Stablecoin inflows (+$331M) combined with meme token expansion ($4.3B market cap) signal retail capital accumulation. This tool helps traders and protocols anticipate volatility and position accordingly.

buildIdeas.title: Universal Solana Wallet Adapter for Web2 Apps
buildIdeas.description: A lightweight, framework-agnostic wallet adapter that integrates Solana payments into existing web2 applications (Shopify, WooCommerce, custom sites). Merchants get one-click Solana payment support without deep blockchain knowledge.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Wallet adapter standardization is mainstream, but integration with web2 commerce platforms remains fragmented. This bridges the gap as Solana payment adoption accelerates.

buildIdeas.title: Margin Trading Risk Engine for Drift Protocol
buildIdeas.description: A risk management system that monitors liquidation risk, collateral ratios, and funding rates across Drift Protocol positions. Traders get real-time alerts and automated deleveraging suggestions to avoid liquidation.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Drift Protocol maintains consistent onchain activity (1000 tx) with mature infrastructure, but traders lack risk management tools. Margin trading is growing, creating demand for liquidation prevention systems.

buildIdeas.title: LayerZero V2 Solana Bridge Monitor & Arbitrage Bot
buildIdeas.description: A bot that monitors cross-chain price discrepancies for assets bridged via LayerZero V2 between Solana and other chains. Arbitrageurs can automatically execute profitable trades, improving price efficiency across ecosystems.
buildIdeas.whyNow: LayerZero V2 and multi-chain wallets are accelerating, but cross-chain arbitrage infrastructure is nascent. This tool helps Solana function as a hub for multi-asset trading as interoperability matures.

buildIdeas.title: Audius Solana Royalty Splitter & Payment Automation
buildIdeas.description: A smart contract system that automates royalty distribution for Audius creators across Solana and Ethereum, splitting payments to collaborators, labels, and platforms. Creators get transparent, real-time payment tracking.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Audius shows active development (+9 commits) and operates on Solana/Ethereum. Cross-chain infrastructure is maturing, enabling automated royalty distribution that improves creator economics.

buildIdeas.title: Solana Validator Economics Simulator
buildIdeas.description: An interactive tool that lets validators model profitability under different scenarios: MEV capture rates, commission structures, hardware costs, and client choices (Firedancer vs. Agave vs. Solana Labs). Validators can make data-driven infrastructure decisions.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Validator client competition is accelerating (Firedancer +3, Agave +1 stars), and MEV economics are becoming material. Validators need tools to evaluate which infrastructure choices maximize returns.

buildIdeas.title: Anchor Program Registry & Dependency Manager
buildIdeas.description: A centralized registry for Anchor programs with dependency resolution, version management, and security scanning. Developers can discover, audit, and integrate battle-tested programs without manual GitHub searching.
buildIdeas.whyNow: Anchor adoption is mainstream and stable, but program discovery remains fragmented. A centralized registry reduces integration friction as Solana developer ecosystem scales and reusable programs proliferate.

newNarratives: Solana Ecosystem Lending & Margin Infrastructure Maturation
removedNarratives: Formal Verification & Smart Contract Security Tooling Adoption
